name: mrmooseyman--seo-prospector
description: Automated SEO prospect research and outreach for web designers, agencies, and freelancers. Use when researching local business prospects, running scheduled prospect clusters, creating outreach packages, generating daily summaries, or managing a lead pipeline. Triggers on "research prospect", "find leads", "prospect report", "outreach for [business]", "run today's clusters", "daily prospect summary", "batch research", "generate outreach", "SEO audit prospect", "local business leads", "cold outreach", "lead pipeline".
